narrative:
Coshocton 4-B (precinct in Coshocton County) has 1,338 registered voters, with 47.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.9 percentage points.
